sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see the key insight! Looking at the state graph:
- State 10: player at [[26, 14], [26, 18], [30, 18], [30, 14]] - tried RIGHT
- State 11: player at [[26, 14], [26, 18], [30, 18], [30, 14]] - same position! RIGHT didn't move the player
- State 12: player at [[32, 14], [32, 18], [36, 18], [36, 14]] - DOWN moved the player
- State 13: player at [[38, 14], [38, 18], [42, 18], [42, 14]] - DOWN moved to red path area
- State 14: player at [[8, 14], [8, 18], [12, 18], [12, 14]] - SPACE reset the player to start
So at state 13, the player was at the red path area (rows 38-42). Then SPACE was pressed, which reset the player to the start. Then the player went DOWN, DOWN, DOWN, DOWN, DOWN (states 14-19), reaching state 20 where DOWN is blocked.
The issue is that at state 13, the player was at the red path but then SPACE was pressed, resetting the player. I need to figure out what to do at state 13 (or equivalent).
At state 13, the player is at [[38, 14], [38, 18], [42, 18], [42, 14]], which is the red path area. From there, SPACE was pressed, which reset the player. I need to try a different action at state 13.
But I can't go back to state 13 directly. I need to navigate back through the state graph. Let me check if there's a way to go back.
Actually, looking at the state graph, I can navigate back by going UP from the current state. The current state is 20, and I need to go back to state 13 or 14.
Let me check: from state 20, can I go UP? If so, I can go UP several times to reach state 14, then try a different action.
Actually wait - the state graph shows the path taken, but I need to check what actions are valid from the current state. The current state is 20, and I've tried DOWN (which was blocked). Let me try UP to go back.

action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
